occupation_title: Bus and Truck Mechanics and Diesel Engine Specialists
occupation_definition: Diagnose, adjust, repair, or overhaul buses and trucks, or maintain and repair any type of diesel engines. Includes mechanics working primarily with automobile or marine diesel engines.
